title: マイルCSの後に・トラストミー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An earsplitting roar rises from the crowd, echoing
through the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: These cheers are for no one else but Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That was amazing, Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for that incredible performance! That
was some race... A race so exciting, I'll never
forget it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaaaw! I really appreciate all the support!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Did ya see that, Trainer? I'm number one! The
King of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You were the first person to believe in me...I did
it... with these... these legs!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh no! This is no time to turn on the waterworks!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If I start blubberin' now, I'll miss out on those
smiles...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yours and everybody else's!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Cheers.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Great job out there, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Thanks! You too, Suzuka. Great job!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Honestly, this is frustrating. I truly, truly gave this race everything I had.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And yet, I came nowhere close to your speed...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Thank ya, Suzuka. You really are... my best friend.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Taiki...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just so you know, I won't be giving up.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I have what it takes to surpass you. I'll go beyond
speed itself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So we have to run together again... Promise me
we will.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Of course, what're friends for? Now, get on in
here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
P-please... no hugs. This habit of yours is a little
suffocating at times...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whaddya mean?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle has continued to ace her races with
perfect results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's conquered the Yasuda Kinen, the Sprinters
Stakes, and the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's even taken down Silence Suzuka, the
strongest Umamusume around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle has what it takes to be a star of her
time—no doubt about it!
choice_data_list:
I just know you can become Umamusume of the
Year!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Darn tootin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Just sit tight and watch me bring my dream to
life, Trainer!
